versions.version_description: The chords are unusual but accurate so you must use the ones that are outlined at the start, using any other variations won't sound right. No capo is needed and tuning is a Half-Step Down (Eb tuning).
This version sounds like the studio version and uses the same chord variants. Enjoy.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Artist: Michael Jackson
Song: Rock With You
Album: Off the Wall

Capo 1

D7sus2:  xx0210
D#7sus2: xx1321

Intro: D7sus2  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
       D7sus2  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C7[/ch]
       D7sus2  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
       [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]

D7sus2
 Girl, close your eyes
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
Let that rhythm get into you[/tab]
D7sus2
 Don't try to fight it
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
There ain't nothin' that you can do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Relax your mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Lay back and groove with mine[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
You got to feel the heat[/tab]

And we can ride the boogie
[tab][ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Share that beat of love[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab]  D7sus2              [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
I wanna rock with you all night[/tab]
[tab]D7sus2             [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C7[/ch]
Dance you into day sunlight[/tab]
[tab]D7sus2                [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
I wanna rock with you all night[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
We're gonna rock the night away[/tab]

D7sus2
Out on the floor
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
There ain't nobody there but us[/tab]
D7su2
Girl, when you dance
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
There's a magic that must be love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch] 
Just take it slow[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]   
 Cause we got so far to go[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
When you feel that heat[/tab]

And were gonna ride the boogie
[tab][ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
Share that beat of love[/tab]

Chorus

Bridge:
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                               [ch]D[/ch]
And when the groove is dead and gone, yeah[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
You know that love survives[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
So we can rock forever, on[/tab]

D7sus2  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
D7sus2  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C7[/ch]
D7sus2  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]                               [ch]C#[/ch]
I wanna rock with you, I wanna groove with you [/tab]

[tab]  D#7sus2     [ch]G#[/ch]  [ch]A#[/ch]
I wanna rock (all night) [/tab]
[tab]    D#7sus2      [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]C#7[/ch]
With you   girl (sunlight)[/tab]
[tab]D7sus2                        [ch]G#[/ch]  [ch]A#[/ch]
Rock with you, rock with you (all night)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]        [ch]G#[/ch]         [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch]
Dance the night away[/tab]

[tab]        D#7sus2             [ch]G#[/ch]  [ch]A#[/ch]
I wanna rock with you yeah, all night[/tab]
[tab]D#7sus2            [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]C#7[/ch]
Rock you into day, sunlight[/tab]
[tab]        D#7sus2        [ch]G#[/ch]  [ch]A#[/ch]
I wanna rock with you, all night[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]       [ch]G#[/ch]         [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch]
Rock the night away[/tab]

[tab]         D#7sus2             [ch]G#[/ch]  [ch]A#[/ch]
Feel the heat feel the beat, all night[/tab]
[tab]D#7sus2            [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]C#7[/ch]
Rock you into day, sunlight[/tab]
[tab]        D#7sus2   [ch]G#[/ch]  [ch]A#[/ch]
I wanna rock,     all night[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]       [ch]G#[/ch]         [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch]
Rock the night away[/tab]
